name: CHONDROMYXOID FIBROMA
definition: rare benign cartilaginous tumor; initially arising in cortex

demographics.Histo: chondroid + fibrous + myxoid tissue (related to chondroblastoma); may be mistaken for
demographics.Size: 1-10 cm in length; 4-7 cm in width

discriminating_features: expansile ovoid lesion with radiolucent center + oval shape at each end of lesion
long axis parallel to long axis of host bone
expanded shell = bulged + thinned overlying cortex (68%)

general: expansile ovoid lesion with radiolucent center + oval shape at each end of lesion
long axis parallel to long axis of host bone
expanded shell = bulged + thinned overlying cortex (68%)
stippled calcifications within tumor in advanced lesions (7%)
